case_title: DANIEL GUERRERO VS. DARYL MCCURRY ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUERRERO, DANIEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DEOLIVEIRA, LEANDRO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,536.45 FILED BY GUERRERO, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT MCCURRY, DARYL DEOLIVEIRA, LEANDRO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-28-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-05-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-05-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $180.00) SERVED JUL-28-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DEOLIVEIRA, LEANDRO
TRIAL RESET TO SEP-09-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUL-28-2015 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED FROM DEFENDANT. FILED BY DEFENDANT DEOLIVEIRA, LEANDRO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-05-2015 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION RE: RESET OF TRIAL FOR NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUERRERO, DANIEL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-09-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT DARYL MCCURRY TO NOV-05-2015 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT LEANDRO DEOLIVEIRA WHO WAS NOT PRESENT AT TODAYS HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - DISMISS DARLY MCCURRY ONLY FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUERRERO, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT MCCURRY, DARYL
MCCURRY, DARYL IS NO LONGER DEFENDANT
